(b. ca. 1386, Firenze, d. 1466, Firenze)

### Marzocco | c. 1419 Sandstone, height 136 cm Museo Nazionale del Bargello, Florence //Welcome to the Web Gallery of Art! Please  ...    | During the same years when the first sculptures by Donatello for the Campanile of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore were executed, he made the Marzocco, the emblem of the city of Florence. It was mentioned in the archives of Santa Maria del Fiore as a stone lion to be placed on top of a column of the stairs of the Pope's apartment in Santa Maria Novella, for the visit to Florence of Pope Martin V in 1419.
